hero.hero_overview:
Khaleed is a fighter hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, known for his strong sustain, mobility, and area-of-effect (AoE) damage. He excels in laning, duels, and team fights, making him a solid pick for both EXP Lane and jungling roles.

Hero Role & Specialty

Role: Fighter

Specialty: Damage / Regen

Lane: EXP Lane / Jungle

Durability: High

Difficulty: Easy to Moderate


Skills & Abilities

1. Passive - Sand Walk

Khaleed gains movement speed when moving, leaving behind a trail of sand. When fully charged, his next basic attack deals extra damage and slows enemies.



2. Skill 1 - Desert Tornado

He spins his sword, dealing AoE damage. If he hits an enemy, he can cast it again up to three times, making it great for burst damage.



3. Skill 2 - Quicksand Guard

Khaleed rests on the ground, recovering HP while gaining damage reduction. This skill allows him to sustain in fights and trade effectively in lane.



4. Ultimate - Raging Sandstorm

Khaleed dashes forward on a sandstorm, becoming immune to crowd control (CC). When he lands, he knocks up enemies and deals massive damage, making it a great initiation tool for team fights.
hero.hero_strength:
Strengths

Great sustain (Skill 2 heals him in fights)
 Strong mobility (Passive + Ultimate for chasing or escaping)
 High burst damage (Skill 1 can be spammed)
 Good team fight presence (Ultimate knocks up enemies
hero.hero_weakness:
Weaknesses

 Weak against crowd control (CC) (If stunned, he can be easily burst down)
 Struggles against ranged

hero.hero_overview:
A hero who takes the initiative in combat. The game is divided into three sections:

1- The beginning of the match: Annoying the jungler. This is represented by trying to harm him and trying to steal the buffl, but the most important thing is trying to weaken the hero so that he does not attack the little turtle. This is so that your jungler takes it and then goes to help the archer.

2- The middle of the match: Trying to obstruct the magician and help the archer as much as possible.

3- The end of the match: There are two cases:

A- In the event of superiority, your team can finish the match smoothly. They will not need you except as a bag of damage, lol.

B- In the event of a loss, try to coordinate with your team and extract the archer from the opponent's team and try to defend until you finally regain strength.
hero.hero_strength: The strength of the hero lies at the beginning of the match.
hero.hero_weakness: The hero's weakness is that he has no control skills except the last one.

data.recommend: I recommend Khaled to those who want to win easily with a good team.

spell.spell_desc: Vengeance Spell: Gives you a 5-second shield that reflects 25% of the damage you take (40% if attacking from towers) as "True Damage" back to the attackers, making it ideal for high-resilience heroes like tanks or warriors in close combat or when defending towers. It is recommended to activate it intelligently while receiving focused attacks from fast-damaging heroes like Marksman or Mage, but it loses its effectiveness against True Damage or instant-kill attacks, and requires careful timing to get the most out of it, especially in teamfights or long-resilience situations.

hero.hero_overview: Khaleed is known for his high mobility, sustain, and crowd control abilities. With his desert-themed skills, Khaleed can dominate the EXP lane, engage in fights effectively, and recover health to stay in battle longer. His unique playstyle makes him a strong pick for aggressive players who like to pressure enemies early and snowball into the late game.
hero.hero_strength: Khaleed is a strong fighter with excellent sustain, mobility, and crowd control. His Quicksand Guard helps him recover HP and reduce damage, making him durable in fights. Desert Tornado allows him to deal burst damage while quickly repositioning. His ultimate, Raging Sandstorm, provides CC immunity and stuns enemies, making it a powerful initiation tool. With strong early-game pressure and solid team fight potential, Khaleed can dominate the battlefield when played strategically.
hero.hero_weakness: Khaleed is vulnerable to crowd control (CC), as stuns or suppressions can stop his mobility and healing. He also struggles against burst damage from assassins and mages, who can eliminate him before he can sustain. Additionally, his ultimate requires precise timing, as a poorly executed engage can leave him exposed to enemy counterattacks. Proper positioning and awareness are crucial to maximizing his effectiveness.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is a great spell for Khaleed because it helps him reposition quickly, both offensively and defensively. Since his ultimate (Raging Sandstorm) requires precise aiming, Flicker can be used to adjust his landing position for a better engage.

data.title: HOW TO BECOME A PRO KHALEED USER

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Once Khaleed initiates using his ultimate,Nana can either use her skill to transform her enemies which slows them down or use her ultimate to deal damage
When Khaleed initiates the teamfight,Vexana can use her ultimate to knock the enemies up and deal damage.

counters.counter_desc: Khaleed is great assassins since most assassins are weak at level 1 and he can harass them reducing their farming speed.
Minsitthar is very good against Khaleed since Minsitthar's ultimate disables dash and blink skills,leaving Khaleed unable to us his skill 1 and ultimate.

dominants.dominant_desc: Take Skill 1.Since Khaleed has great early game damage,invade the enemy jungler to reduce their farming speed.When your passive is full,use basic attack and use skill 1.When using skill 1,control the hero movement by using joystick.If the invasion is unsuccessful,rotate to the lane that is having a hard time against the opponent.

Make sure all your skills are ready.Use your ultimate to stunt the enemy heroes and then use skill 1 to deal damage.If your HP is low,you can use skill 2 to regain your HP however if the enemy has hard CC like airborne,suppression and knockup,find a safe spot before using your skill.Additionally,you can initiate a fight using your passive but it is only recommend when there is only 1 enemy hero.

emblems.emblem_desc: Use tank emblem since you are the main frontline hero for your team.Firmness is great for roam Khaleed since it provides extra Physical and Magic defense.Tentacity is also great for Khaleed since it increases defense when your HP is low.The most important talent for Khaleed as a roamer id Concussive blast since it works well with his passive and deal significantly high damage to squishy heroesamd is great for poking in early game.

equips.equip_desc: Thunder Belt is an excellent item for Khaleed since he can stack it quickly,thanks to his passive.Dominance Ice reduces enemy hero's healing ability and reduces their attack speed.Athena's Shield provides magic damage reduction which is great for countering heroes that deal burst magic damage.Additonally,Antique Cuirass offers skill damage reduction is good against heroes that relies on skills to deal damage.Immortality provides another chance for you to escape incase something goes wrong.

hero.hero_strength: Khaleed is a hero with high mobility,excellent durability and has great early game damage.He can be used as roamer to harass the enemy jungler,delay their farming and can regen when his HP is low with his skill 2
hero.hero_weakness: Use the skill 2 wisely as it can be interrupted by high level CC like airborne,suppress,etc

counters.counter_desc: Ruby has a lot of crowd control that will disrupt Khaleed's skills. Stay away from hee when you are alone
WaIt for him to use all of his skills before attacking sincehe deals massive damage.
Freya has alot of crowd control effects which is very annoying if you are using khaleed. AVoid her when you are alone.
Khufra can disrupt khaleed's skills especially his 1st skill.
No need to explain
Timing is the key to defeat her. (Applies to Hayabusa, ling, helcurt

dominants.dominant_desc: Leash the jungler, then immidiately assist midlane by zoning the enemy mid laner, then go to gold lane after delaying the enemy midlaner
Use ultimate to chase and stun the enemies then use petrify to stun them again. Use 1st skill to damage enemies then use 2nd skill after teamfight or when low hp.( this applies to lord/turtle fights)
During turtle/Lord fights, zone enemies by poking with your 1st skill along with your passive skill.

dominants.dominant_desc: usahakan dari early sampai mid game kalian terus mendominasi guys, gimana sih caranya? cukup clear lane sambil poking lawan kalian di lane, melakukan rotasi yang penting, turtle selalu set up sebelum muncul dan selalu cari kesempatan untuk join fight tanpa merugi

emblems.emblem_desc: saat laning phase juga kita membutuhkan damage untuk melakukan poking kepada lawan, oleh sebab itu saya mengambil thrill disini, dan emblem emblem seperti concussive blast juga menambah damage di awal

equips.equip_desc:
mengala saya mengambil thunder belt? itu untuk efek slow tambahan dan damage tambahan, juga defense yang didapatkan sangat banyak seiring bertambahnya stack
dominance ice untuk mengurangi drain lifesteal lawan atau mengurangi atau memperlambat basic attack lawan
radiant armor itu adalah item opsional yang bisa diganti sesuai kondisi masing masing, blade armor juga kondisional, apabila hero hero lawan banyak mengandalkan basic attack,saya sarankan untuk mengambil blade armor
queen wings atau yang biasa kita sebut sayap, saya ambil untuk reduce cooldown, dan lifesteal tambahan , tetapi itu juga bisa diganti dengan oracle ataupun immortal

hero.hero_overview: early game beli thunder belt aja, jangan pernah beli sepatu di awal karena seperti yang kita tau khaleed itu movement speed nya lumayan baik karena terbantu pasif nya, begitu thunder belt jadi boleh beli sepatu kulit sambil perbanyak mencuri curi stak thunder belt dari pawan, karena setiap stak nya sangat amat berpengaruh, setelah itu kali boleh buat dominance ice atau item defense seperti athena shield, radiant, blade armor atapun antique  setelah itu item lainnya opsional menurut kenyamanan dan situasinya.
hero.hero_weakness: sebenarnya khaleed ini kelemahannya hampir sama seperti hero pada umumnya, crowd control adalah hal yang paling sangat menyebalkan bagi pengguna khaleed

spell.spell_desc: untuk beberapa kondisi tertentu flicker atau vengeance memang bagus tetapi untuk teamfight dari early sampai mid game, saya menyarankan revitalize karena memang ini yang sangat baik sejauh ini karena diawal healnya cukup deras
